calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify And Transfer Plaintiff'S Case To A Court Of Limited Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BEREN THERAPEUTICS, P.B.C.'S unopposed Motion To Reclassify And Transfer Plaintiff'S Case To A Court Of Limited Jurisdiction is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
